name: 更好的故障机器人 / Better Defect
author: Codex
description: v103/vPC compatible full build: restores 26 old Defect cards, keeps cross-run strict zero-sum rarity-local dynamic odds and per-card disabled-state persistence, fixes Fission orb visuals, restores the starter Strike -> Ball Lightning replacement, no BaseLib. Encyclopedia-only card disabling, 14 historical versions and 45 custom transformations now share a persistent 50-point budget: 25 blue Normal points, 10 yellow Overclock points and 15 red Overload points. v0.11.2 keeps the v0.11.1 Android ARM64 startup-stability fixes.
